title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates building a Jira adapter for Archon, enabling tickets to trigger AI-powered bug fixes and automatic pull request generation. The system maintains per-ticket conversation state with Archon and integrates with existing GitHub, Slack, Telegram, and Discord workflows.
